description_long: This is a chunky knit beanie hat featuring a thick, ribbed texture with alternating strands of pink and white yarn. The hat has a wide, folded cuff at the base, adding extra warmth and a cozy appearance. The crown is soft and slightly pointed, giving it a relaxed, slouchy silhouette. The knit pattern is prominent and tactile, with large, interwoven loops that create a visually striking surface. There are no visible decorative elements, logos, or embellishments on the exterior. The overall look is casual and warm, ideal for cold urban environments.
description: A thick, ribbed knit beanie hat in pink and white with a wide folded cuff and a soft, slouchy crown. The chunky yarn and bold texture give it a cozy, casual appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, folded cuff and the ribbed knit pattern in pink and white.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the pointed, slouchy crown and the thickness of the knit.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the ribbed texture and the symmetrical shape of the hat.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the pointed crown and the depth of the folded cuff.
attribute_brim_style: wide folded cuff, no traditional brim
